mechanism_narrative: Lower federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive 20d returns occur in less than 50% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate crossing above 6.0 percent signals severe labor market deterioration and collapsing consumer spending, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns within one week.
failure_condition: Positive 20d forward returns occur in more than 55% of triggered instances, or the signal produces a negative Rank IC over a 24-month window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real GDP and retail sales confirms broad-based demand recovery, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in both series fails to produce positive forward returns in more than 60% of cases, or interaction term loses statistical significance.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production index during a post-shock recovery phase indicates capacity utilization rebound and corporate earnings acceleration, yielding positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases of greater than 1.0% fail to predict positive returns in more than 50% of observations during recovery regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price index crossing above 260 signals accelerating inflation that forces markets to price in aggressive monetary tightening, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL above 260 coincides with positive 20d returns in more than 65% of instances, or the threshold loses predictive power after 2021.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence where total nonfarm payrolls decline while the unemployment rate rises indicates structural labor market weakness, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: The payroll-unemployment divergence fails to generate negative forward returns in more than 55% of cases, or the interaction effect is statistically indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts crossing below 1500 thousand units signals collapsing construction demand and reduced household wealth effects, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: HOUST below 1500 triggers positive 20d returns in more than 60% of instances, or the signal exhibits negative out-of-sample Sharpe ratio.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month increases in the industrial production index reflect expanding manufacturing output and supply chain normalization, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns within one week.
failure_condition: Positive INDPRO changes fail to predict positive 5d returns in more than 50% of observations, or Rank IC drops below 0.01 over rolling 12-month windows.
